# Short Bumper Storyboard

Use this template for an explicitly approved `3-6` second landscape or vertical
bumper. Record all departures from the default feature-reel contract in the
campaign brief.

## Story Contract

**Campaign ID:**

**Feature or destination:**

**Single primary benefit:**

**Target duration and format:**

**Primary CTA or approved product-only ending:**

**Approved factual source filename:**

**Audio treatment:**

## Timed Storyboard

| Time | Story Purpose | Product Proof / Visual | Visible Copy | Motion / Audio |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Opening | Establish context or hook immediately | | | |
| Proof | Show the approved factual source clearly | | | |
| Resolution | Settle on the strongest benefit or approved CTA | | | |

## Review Frames

| Review Frame | Frame Number | What Must Be Verified | Approved |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Frame zero | | Intentional opening; no unintended blank frame | |
| Hook or context | | Readable destination or idea | |
| Feature proof | | Factual source remains unchanged and legible | |
| Final hold | | Motion settles; approved ending is clear | |

## Approved Exceptions

| Default Requirement Changed | Approved Treatment | Reason | Approver |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Duration | | | |
| Format | | | |
| Source type | | | |
| Audio | | | |
| Closing CTA / logo frame | | | |

## Gate 2 Approval

- [ ] The idea is understandable within the approved duration.
- [ ] The proof comes from an approved factual source.
- [ ] Frame zero and the final hold are intentional.
- [ ] Motion is limited to one purposeful idea and settles before the end.
- [ ] Every departure from the default reel contract is approved.

**Approved by:**
